dialogueChunks.intro: It is done, {player_name}. {quest_threat} have been dealt with. {quest_stakes} can rest in peace now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community gathered to honor the fallen today. Your name was spoken alongside theirs: not as a killer, but as someone who stood for our people.
dialogueChunks.outro: This was not about hatred. It was about love for the ones we lost. Thank you for understanding that.

playerResponses.text: They deserved to be remembered. I am glad I could help.
I hope this brings some measure of peace.
It is over now. Focus on the living.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the deed is done. You managed to {quest_action}, and {quest_threat} will harm no one else.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} lit a fire at {quest_focus} in remembrance. The community mourns, but there is relief in knowing the danger has passed. {quest_stakes} have been honored.
dialogueChunks.outro: Vengeance is a heavy burden. You carried it well.

playerResponses.text: No one should have to carry this burden alone.
It is finished. That is what matters.

dialogueChunks.intro: The scales are balanced, {player_name}. {quest_threat} answered for what they did to {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus} is quiet now. {quest_ally} says the families are beginning to heal. The grief will linger, but the fear is gone.
dialogueChunks.outro: You fought for people you never knew, on behalf of a community's pain. That is a rare kind of honor.

playerResponses.text: Everyone deserves someone to fight for them.
I hope the families find peace.
Keep your people safe going forward. That is the best tribute.
